## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Send `/start` to the bot
2. Tap '...'
3. Enter '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or logs.

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or paste relevant logs.

<details>
<summary>Logs</summary>

```
Paste logs here
```

</details>

## Environment

- **Bot version**: (e.g. v1.2.3)
- **Hosting**: (e.g. Railway, Docker, local)
- **Python version**: (e.g. 3.11)
- **Platform affected**: (e.g. Instagram, TikTok, all)

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem.
